content.text:
All tests pass (2 passing, 53 todo).

Green Phase Complete:
- Implementation: Added minimal logic to `quote`: if items is empty, return processing fee (5); otherwise return base (100) + first-insurance (10) + processing fee (5) = 115
- Result: All tests now pass (2 passing, 53 todo)
- Approach: This is minimal — it handles exactly the two activated test cases. Hardcoded base of 100 is acceptable since only "sword" type is tested. No item-type lookup, no enchantment logic, no curse logic — those will be added when future tests demand them.
